name: HashiCorp Vault
description: Monitor HashiCorp Vault health, secrets engines, and policies for secrets management compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Get a Vault token with appropriate permissions (read access to sys/health and sys/mounts)
2. You can create a token using: vault token create -policy=<policy-name>
3. Copy the token and paste it below

checks.name: Secure Secrets
checks.description: Verifies HashiCorp Vault is initialized, unsealed, and healthy

checks.name: Encryption at Rest
checks.description: Verifies Vault has secrets engines configured for encryption at rest
